author: Mia T.
comment: Bright and floral, exactly what I need in the morning.

author: Jonah K.
comment: Great daily drip, wish it stayed hot a bit longer.

author: Priya S.
comment: The vanilla syrup is not too sweet, oat milk foam is perfect.

author: Andre L.
comment: Best croissant I've had outside of Paris, honestly.

author: Sam R.
comment: Cream cheese icing is dangerous. Get there early, they sell out.

author: Elena V.
comment: Smooth, chocolatey, my go-to on hot days.
